gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the README/test changes with no findings; reviewer verified tests/test_project_governance.py passed.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Synchronized the README Remaining V1 Work strict release-bundle checklist with the artifact set enforced by release_bundle.py.
Added a governance test that derives strict artifact labels from STRICT_V1_RELEASE_REQUIRED_ARTIFACTS and checks the README section.
why: The strict release artifact set evolves over time; the public release checklist should drift-fail when release_bundle.py changes instead of going stale.
